responses.travel: I travelled using Obs 1 probably on public transport, maybe an Uber. Hung out in the shadows around the area maybe an hour or two before start. There was the usual Ruse of a VVIP pickup with security detail, earpieces, the whole bit! I had some minor celebrities in evening gowns manipulated/encouraged to participate in the entourage. I entered the vehicle as it arrived at Court (obs2). Visibly walked from limo to doorway/elevator/bouncer. Limousine departs with celebs in tow for a night at the Star Casino once I am out.
responses.game_recount:
- tried to meet all the new players (1st time) so really just engaged in character with all players that would have the chat in character. There was the odd notable blanking and rudeness (presumably IC for "lore reasons"). No powers or spending influence.

- Premier finally addressed Carthians after keeping us waiting and proceeded to: set rules; offer explanations as to why this experiment needed to be done in a particular way; copped the verbal bluster of various Carthians trying to state covenant parity; stated a plan to restrict Elders and Blood Potency city-wide because "YOUNG" and "EXPERIMENT".  Yusuf offered support to Carthian principles. tsk.

- Met with the other Carthians who seemed more concerned with establishing the rules for the committee to police each others behaviour according to a new rubric. One carefully designed so that all roles - EXCEPT PREMIER FOR SOME REASON - are shared like a fucking conch shell, so that no one can claim Regency except as proxy for the Movement. lol

- Noticed duplicitous dealings involving Invictus but had the Premier rudely "send me away"

- Made a ploy for Regency of Harbour against Reed to test the level of support. I did not manage to get a meeting with the Premier in time, or they forgot, whatever. My name was likely not even on the ballot. Just as well - I never found the voting box to place my influence. haha. OOC n00b.
responses.rp_shoutout: Ludika - young Invictus (mekhet I think, maybe Ventrue - OOC I could NOT read any tags or sheets in the game unfortunately vision impairment). We had a fascinating IC conversation. She had real questions...  Conrad Sonderguard. His innocent probing and gentle banter. Get close to that guy. Sneakiest bastard in court I reckon. Great IC interactions.
responses.correspondence:
X
Have [RE]cent eve[N]ts hav[E] [ST]unne[D] me[?]
[CARTHIAN] work[S] ar[E] quite[T] [UP]lifting.
[NE]v[E]r woul[D you] [H]av[E] mo[RE] joy [AS AP]pealing as this new experiment.

Ý̵̧̭Ù̴͓̐́S̵̟͖̐̑Ù̴͑́͝F̴͌̾̄͠
responses.trust: `Einar TechnoViking` - perhaps. He seems ready to stand up to the Premier when they cross the line and betray Carthian principles but a little slow to see that line has already been crossed.
responses.harm: Rene StD (Invictus), the real seat of power and influence in Sydney. THe worm in the Premiers ear. I have a verbal truce to work with, rather than against, Reed Justice (Conan) and I am happy to be true to that arrangement. But....Rene..... He's Invictus "Team Captian", Primogen, Regent of Docks, presumably way up in his clan status too. this guy has peak influence, more city status than the Premier probably.... Why has no one noticed? Am I living in LALA land?
responses.aspirations:
Yusuf feels isolated and unsupported. The Mammon Cult (MMN) is in formative stage, but I dont really have any surety to bother building it up just for someone else to take. At the same time I have not been subtle with its presence. The cult served its initial purpose - the contrivance to get me to Sydney. It stands out as a target. Perhaps I will set it up at this stage as a honey-pot to lure investigation and actions of other kindred. I see the cult as a presently useful expendable asset.

I am guest everywhere, marginalised even in the Covenant. Yusuf has a job here in Sydney - to protect Brandy. But he sees both her and Eve witless puppets on a string of more organised powers. A dangerous predicament. Yusuf must help himself first. Hence taking OBS5. And working on his lair. Mt plans are to get safe and embedded. This court seems like a dangerours and specially curated fishbowl designed to fail. I worry about the consequences for the Carthian Movement. I fear we have been trojan horsed by Eve with a plan to humiliate the movement on the global stage as the "Carthian Experiment" fails spectacularly.

It is unlikely building clan status within the Carthians will be viable. They are riven, misguided and working against their own interests. Eve has already cleverly seen to that. Handing out boons to those who are giddy with the proximity to praxis and ignoring those not actively bending knee. The younger Carthians in the movement seem enthusiastic to embrace a "lets see hoe THEY like it attitude, rather than a lets do this properly".

The City status game is meta-unstable and already stitched up. There are inner and outer cliques quickly forming and Yusuf sees no way into the inner cliques. So Yusuf must build.... 
with what he has left in the space left to him. THE SEWERS.

The sewers and catacombs in the territory no one bothered wanting... with his Clan - the Nosferatu.  There are not many Nos, and they don't usually play well - not with others and not with themselves. I will make a place in the catacombs. I will open it to others of my kind. I will see who will come to the Necropolis once it is built. The first bricks are laid in this downtime.

SHORT: GET MYSELF SAFE
MEDIUM: BUILD THE NOS, PROTECT MMN
LONG: NECROPOLIS UNDER THEIR FEET
responses.feeding_description:
Presence 4 + Empathy 3 + Spec: Motives 1 = 12
Type: HUMAN blood
Style: I like the homeless people. The cold, dark and rains drive them into the corners where this crawler creeps. Face-in-the-crowd Yusuf blends in. He likes the dirt and the smell. 
He likes the taste, a goon-bag of wine and a blanket are gifts enough. They sit and talk about their shit lives. Yusufs life was probably shitter, but at least they feel it, Yusuf thinks. And he tastes the goon-bag and hardship in them equally. He drinks at the end of the bin-fire in the hours just before dawn - never killing these.... no never killing. This is an act of sharing in my mind... lol

*Normally* he eats from his HERD of Bankers and the Elites from behind the Mammon throne. Expensive cologne, pressed shirts. They offer their necks up - ecstatic and trembling.

It is a bland feast and sometime you just need "home*-cooking".

*less
responses.project_1_description:
Project Name: Very Very Sneaky
Characters: ME
XP SPEND: 3
Merits: Safe Place 1
Learn Obfuscate 5. Use Oubliette Power on my safe place lair in the under-Harbour.
responses.project_2_pool_primary: Presence 4 + Intimidation 4 + Spec(Veiled threat) 1 + Air of Menace 2 + Nightmare 4 = 15
responses.project_2_outcome: Make the sewers under the Harbour territory suitable for Nosferatu inhabitation
responses.project_2_description:
Project Name: A fear cleanse of the Burrows
Characters: Me 
Merits: Air of Menace
XP: None
Description: I am physically taking myself physically through whatever tunnels I can get access to. The deeper and weirder the better. Appearing as familiar maintenance crew using OBS or simply invisible - i root around down there spreading terror. Moving out the Cave Clan (Human sydney-based subterraneanist community irl) using dread presence and waking terror (nightmare 4). Making it very inhospitable. It will help motivate the "emergency works" needed to seal it off... cf Mystery Cult Acquisition action
responses.project_3_outcome: Move Safe Place 1 into Under Harbour
responses.project_3_description:
NAME: A rotten Nest
CAST: Me
MERITS: Safe Place 1
XP: NONE
DESC: I am starting to setup my own personal space in the underHarbour as it opens. A large Siphon. The access to it is presently a little too open. Too many routes still in and out that are mortal traversible, but it will be a great space with work. Whilst waiting for the future construction mods and investment, I move my possessions, set up a small lair, and shed the vitae to hide it, twist it, and make it a suitable nightmare churn-funnel so that Yusuf feels confident he would hear distant screams and not the sounds of approach...
responses.project_4_description:
NAME: "MMN Sees"
CAST: ME
BONUSES:
DESC: This is the required DT action to keep the whole Mystery Cult apparatus going. Mainting networks, grooming new members, allocating resources, solving the odd mortal cult issue
responses.sphere_1_description: The Mammon cult may not be good for elite members, but on their climb up its ranks the entropy of their climb maketh the garden more verdant for all kindred...
responses.sphere_2_outcome: Identify Kindred who fuck with the Harbour ambience
responses.sphere_2_description: The harbour will be my home all going well. I need to sniff around and find out who the Kindred in the area are. Ballsack I know. Einar, I know, Reed, I know. What I want to know is who is trying to bring down the ambience of the Harbour (if anyone). it will touch the underworld most likely.
responses.sphere_3_description: The subtle pro-kindred enshittification of Sydney Harbour after dark. (For the Nos 3am vibe baby!!!)The territory will be both better (for all) and worse (for mortals) in a clever way. Events will simultaneously draw people into the Harbour district, but stupid track-works close down public transport just as events let out forcing walks home. Public works for safety that actually break existing lighting. Energy saving initatives means that there is dim-lights but far apart. cost savings. it is almost like the bad ideas are deliberate....
responses.sphere_4_description: The network of influence in Politics and Finance that is the MMN cult reaps its rewards in greased palms. The right bribe, the right contract, the right environmental report. Volia - whole chunks of subterranean tunnels sealed off with special works here - accidental concrete spill there, sealed off for the M11 tunnel. Tunnels, mostly bare, ugly, damp, infested. But directly underneath and nowhere all at once! It is a patchwork of forgotten RTA service tunnels, WW2 shuttered ammunition tunnels, redundant storm-water catchment sumps, etc... It is not ownership per se. It is sealing the entry points off little clusters and burying them administratively so they are nobody's business.
responses.contact_1:
Contact Type: POLICE
Supporting Info: a brief chat with Conrad Sondergard about the best surveillance tech
Request: I want info about access and control points for the distribution of such tech within law enforcement (relates to my Skill Resource Acquisition - Intimidate)...
responses.contact_2:
Contact Type: HIGH SOCIETY
Supporting Info: I have a name "Rene St Dominique" and a hand drawn picture.
Request: Asking contacts to see if Rene St.D is throwing weight around these circles in any meaningful way. I want to find out how much influence he has, and if he has Allies (High Society)
responses.contact_3:
Contact Type: MEDIA
Supporting Info: Information from last downtime search in Shore Finance district
Request: Last months search indicated that there is another player with established Allies Finance in the game. A media exposé on multi-nationals will be a good chance to look into new players in detail. (Avoid Reed Justice)
responses.contact_4:
Contact Type: OCCULT
Supporting Info: Strange reports of a night of disturbance - collated at court
Request: Ask what the latest scoop on the infestation night was? Wandering Nos? Animalism Vandalism? Altar Consecration? There are whispers in these circles FOR SURE...
responses.contact_5:
Contact Type: STREET
Supporting Info: rumours of a vigiliantee in the Harbour
Request: The word on the street is Ballsack is rolling in the lower tiers as a vigilantee. I want details. Is this some kind of Punisher style murderer using vigilantism as a justification to kill or is there a daredevil style hand targeting the previously untouchables? The street contacts may have anecdotes and better rumours. What is his caper? I am trying to find out the why more than the what.
responses.resources_acquisitions:
Character Resources Level: 3
Relevant Merit: Allies (Finance)
Res-Acq 1 Description: A continued investment in the maintenance of decoration of the MMN cult premises in the Shore. This is not security, the facility has no real security at this stage. I want it to LOOK like a VEILED THREAT, an obviously and SUSPICIOUSLY open target. It is what it is. "Like an obviously armed homeowner trying to trigger castle-doctrine". Any thinking kindred is being invited to look and think twice.
Res-Acq 1 Availability: 3
responses.skill_acquisitions:
Character Skill Level: Intimidate 4 + Spec: Veiled Threats 1
Relevant Merit: Air of Menace +2, Contacts (Police)
Skill-Aqu # Description: Surveillance Thermal Cameras x3 with LoRaWanMesh Monitors x2 (Advanced - Encrypted Piezo-powered)
Skill-Aqu # Availability: 3 (+1 for the advanced I guess ST?) = 4
responses.vamping:
yes.The surveillance cameras I am trying to procure are a gift for Conrad Sunderland. I will pass them on with the full chain-of-custody documentation that certifies they are not manipulated or modified in any way between the Israeli manufacturer and his secured delivery. It is up to his discretion whether to trust that - but I have not manipulated the cameras in any way. I make it very clear that these cameras are a gift, without strings or obligation attached and he is free to use them however he likes but he must note that there are 2 monitor portals for the cameras (there are 3 cams) and I have the second one. In the spirit of "a pleasure shared is a pleasure doubled". I will contact the player IC on Discord with my "attempt". I guess rolls will determine if it came off to secure them...

My nights are focused with either managing the cult of Mammons activities, which I see like a job taking several half nights every week. This occurs in the Shore. One of those, I will stop by the Crone Temple on night of service - explaining that the Mother offered invite that I have spontaneously accepted. (all true except the spontaneous part). This attendance is lip service to my Hostesses in the Shore. My initial actual curiosity in the sermon is minimal. But I have never actually witnessed any REAL CRUAC up close before and it might just be a surprise awakening. I should let Mother Crone Anichka roll against my Resolve+BP probably to see how compelling her sermon is. ;)

I like to inhabit the Harbour now. I like it neglected to be honest and I want to savour the shittyness before the kindred money moves in. I supplemnent herd feeding there. I lurk and menace. I want the sewers (only) to be a place of twisted vibes. particularly the near the manholes, drains and rail maintenance tunnels adjacent to my Safe Place.  I want everything to avoid those corners except the cockies.

This serves the long-term goal to establish a SafePlace/Warren/Necropolis for the Nos.
[!!!] Im not going for any mechanical benefit from Nos rulebook. My XP is pre-spent in my head for the next 2 years... lol. At most I am trying to build up my own Clan status, by embodying peak-Nos'ness, supporting other clanspeeps, and reaching out along Nos lines so that the other Nos know the I/WE ARE here, lurking too. I'd be cool if we share SafePlace merits together, and my OBS5 Oubliette can make for a truly BIZONKERS commons. I reckon its narratively cool and want to try to get traction next game... I hope the STs agree?
responses.xp_spend:
XP Claimed:  3
Total XP Spent: 3
Project 1: 3XP
responses.lore_request: GROW action and requirements. how that interacts with territory. which territories have which social groups as focused isn't super clear how that all works. Do I need to be regent of the Shore to scramble for Allies 5? Can the regent of the shore strip that?
responses.form_feedback: it would be cool if you had, like, a dedicated website or something, .... Should only take a couple of days.... week tops! ;)

responses.travel: Einar is getting about by public transport for the time being - learning the routes through the city, and how the people move. He gets off at random stops a couple of times, and waits for the next bus or train heading in the same direction - keeping an eye out for anybody who does the same more than once.
responses.game_recount:
- Discussed the Eldrich inclement weather and rat plague with Maggie, Mac, and Caz. They are all concerned about the potential danger to the Masquerade that this obvious Blood Magic poses.
- Met the new Carthian Nosferatu, Yusuf. He is strange but may be a valuable asset if his boasting about his assets and abilities hold true.
- Learned that one of the mortals I beat into unconsciousness at Cyrus club remembered my face, and gave a description to the cops which resulted in an accurate sketch of my mug. Brandy "took care of it" through her contacts, apparently, and didn't even ask anything in return. That is pretty suspicious.
- The Premier informed us of her plans for the City. The Carthian's seem mostly on board for it.
- Was voted to be 2IC of the Ventrue Council in Carver's absence and then announced to be a valued member of the court, increasing my city status by Brandy at the end of the night.
responses.rp_shoutout: Daniel, the new player in the Red Suit who played "Etsy". It was his first game, and he played pretty hard and loose, copped a lot of shit, and took it like a champ.
responses.correspondence:
Lord X (Sire to Premier Evangeline)

The Kindred of the City are settling into their new home. Your Childe appears to be acquitting herself well - establishing connections, making friends and... "allies".
Regents have been selected, and territories established - I expect that the fairly amicable relationships between the Covenants may soon be tested once the Kindred begin to find themselves more comfortable, or less so.
Though the shadow war that appears to be happening between the Crone and the Sanctum seems to have caused some anomalies that put pressure on the sanctity of the Masquerade - for now, your investments seem secure, and your Childe may yet earn my respect on her own merits before the expiry of the terms of our agreement.

- E
responses.trust: Einar trusts that Rene has his back - but her history and attitudes toward some other Kindred may get her, and drag Einar into trouble that he did not ask for.
responses.harm:
Brandy is a problem. Though she has actively helped Einar, her complete lack of interest in accepting any kind of repayment for covering up his mistake, only to then elevate his city status - she is either in love with Einar, overly keen to serve the Premier, or she is up to something nefarious that Einar cannot quite name yet. Einar is not necessarily looking to harm Brandy, but he is starting to feel that he needs some kind of leverage.

Reed Justice is also problematic. Einar has developed an amicable relationship with him, but his confirmation to the Ventrue council that he is "that" kind of Ventrue when Einar suggested that the Ventrue as a courtesy should "stay out of each other's heads" makes him to Einar's mind one of the most dangerous Kindred in the City. Again, while Einar is not actively trying to harm Reed, he is extremely wary, and keen to find some kind of leverage.
responses.aspirations:
- Establish a home around the Harbour to be close to the ocean.

- Find a warehouse to utilize carpentry skills and begin constructing a boat after the fashion of the ones Einar used to sail in his youth.

- Keep Evangeline alive for at least 6 months to fulfil my contract with her Sire, then revisit how alive Evangeline needs to be after that time.
responses.feeding_description:
Feeding Pool:  Strength 3 (Vigor +2 passive) + Brawl 5 = 10

Blood Type: Human

Feeding Style: Einar is going to stalk the seediest pubs, clubs and bars - finding only the most intoxicated of individuals and ambushing them as they stumble home in the dark.
responses.project_1_pool_primary: Wits 2 + Investigation 3 + Acute Sense (add BP + 2) + Protean 4 = 11
responses.project_1_outcome: Patrol the second City, keeping an eye out for poachers, interlopers, and ne'er-do-wells.
responses.project_1_description:
Project Name: "Eye in the Sky"

Characters involved: Just me.

Merits & Bonuses: Acute Sense, Protean beast form (Raven)

XP Spend: N/A

Project description: 
Einar aims to take the form of a Raven using his Protean discipline and keep an eye on the Carthian's territory in the Second City from the sky. Should he discover somebody getting up to something they shouldn't he will follow and watch, taking note of who they are, what they are doing, and where they go - but not make any moves against them at this time.
responses.project_2_description:
Project Name: “Drinking a cup of Concrete”

Characters involved: Just me

Merits & Bonuses: N/A

XP Spend: 4

Project description: 
Einar takes himself down to a quiet part of the beach late at night, puts a few rocks in his pockets, expels any and all air from his undead lungs and walks out into the deep, dark wetness.

Striding along the ocean floor, utilizing his Acute Senses to see through the murky darkness, Einar trains his body under the stresses of heightened water pressure as he sprints against the currents, lifts rocks out of the sand, and shadowboxes while summoning the power of his blood to thicken his vitae and improve the potency of his Vigor.
responses.project_3_pool_primary: Wits 2 + Investigation 3 + Acute Sense (add BP + 2) + Protean 4 = 11
responses.project_3_outcome: Patrol The Harbour district, keeping an eye out for poachers, interlopers, and ne'er-do-wells.
responses.project_3_description:
Project Name: "Watcher over the Water"

Characters involved: Just me.

Merits & Bonuses: Acute Sense, Protean beast form (Raven)

XP Spend: N/A

Project description: 
Once again in the form of a Raven using his Protean discipline, Einar plans to watch over The Harbour district from the sky. Should he discover someone getting up to something they shouldn't he will follow and watch, taking note of who they are, what they are doing, and where they go - but not make any moves against them at this time.

Einar has secured feeding rights in The Harbour from Reed Justice as he wishes to haven near the water.
responses.project_4_description:
Project Name: "Nocturnal Nibbles"

Characters involved: Just me

Merits & Bonuses: N/A

XP Spend: N/A

Project description:
Einar is going to stalk the seediest pubs, clubs and bars - finding only the most intoxicated of individuals and ambushing them as they stumble home in the dark.
responses.vamping:
- Casimir has reached out to Einar to ask for help in learning the Carthian training style of "Mobilize Outrage", which Einar is more than happy to assist them in. With the first rank being "Strike to Preempt", he would teach them how to focus their righteous anger into a focal point, controlling that rage and unleashing it on an opponent without tempting the Beast. He would probably need to show the technique to Caz a few times by using it on them - he knows they can handle it, and he would not utilize his claws for such demonstrations / training.

- After his feeding debacle last month, Einar will be keen to get back out for a night on the town, having a good time with Cyrus and Teegan.
responses.xp_spend:
XP Claimed:  Game Attendance 1, Costuming/Immersion 1, Downtime 1

(I have re-sent my Covenant Ordeal, which for some reason had not gone through, which was the cause of my confusion last month)

Should have 1xp leftover from last game

Project 2: 4xp, Gain Vigor 3
responses.form_feedback: I have found the multiple separations of elements of the projects to be difficult to track, and I am honestly not sure if I have put everything in the right place. I am sure it makes it easier for you guys to isolate the information for your records, so I am sure I can deal with it, and will get used to it, but I have struggled to be certain I am looking at the right thing.

responses.travel: I drive myself. I park in a public parking bay in the city and use the back-alleys to walk the rest of the distance
responses.game_recount:
Met up with the rest of the Sydney Invictus
Supported Reed Justice in his bid to become Regent of the Harbor
Discussed what needs to be done to complete my initiation into the Invictus
Mingled with the other Kindred
responses.rp_shoutout: Keeper: They used Dominate in a way that allowed me to get involved in something I otherwise wouldn't have. Reed Justice, who suggested an alternative solution to a problem that Ryan would not have come to on his own
responses.correspondence:
(This is a physical letter, as is my lieges preferred method of communication)
To my Liege, Lord Alexander of Wellington
I don't know how formal you want this letter but there's no other way to put it - Courts as fucked as you said it'd be. Never been around so many non Invictus before, and the current Premier is a Carthian so there's that. Oh and I decided to tell the other members of the First Estate about my initiation - decided I'd better not be hiding things from my betters on night 1, there was a bit of tension after that but I think for the most part things are going to be fine going forward

I think whatever plans you've got for Sydney, it's going to be more difficult than you assumed, I've dealt with literal criminals with more business sense and discipline than these creatures.

I also met up with Lord Reed and he's just as capable as you described, glad I'll be working with him.

I'm not good at ending these things, I'll do my best to get better at it
- Ryan
responses.trust: Lord Reed, my liege and his seem to have a business arrangement, so as long as that holds I feel like I can trust Reed
responses.harm: None, I'm currently too focused on fulfilling this Oath to worry much about the others at court
responses.aspirations:
Short Term: Fulfill my Oath and complete my initiation into the First Estate
Medium: Establish a criminal network
Long: See a member of the First Estate installed as Prince
responses.feeding_description: (Strength + Streetwise) - I use my knowledge of back-streets to find isolated targets. I then pounce on them, overpowering them and feeding
responses.project_1_description:
Project Name: Assisting Ballsack
Characters involved: Me, Ballsack
Merits & Bonuses: None
XP Spend: n/a
Project description: Ballsack seems like someone who can handle business, but I wanted to know for sure. I was planning on finding out the old fashioned way, but Lord Reed suggested I head out on patrol with him instead to see how he operates.

I Support Ballsack using my knowledge of local streets and businesses, and draw on my own history as a poacher to discern where a poacher is most likely to attempt to hide their activities. To assist in this I use Protean (2): Predatory Aspect to give myself Extra Sense and Feral Senses to better locate Kindred trying to get a free feed.
responses.project_2_description:
Project Name: Leashing the Beast
Characters Involved: Me
Merits & Bonuses: Ride the Wave
XP Spend: Ride the Wave 4/5
Project Description: I switch my phone off for a week and disappear into the Blue Mountains. Here I work on instigating the beast through hunger, and work on redirecting the beasts desire when it inevitably tries to take hold of me. I use Protean (1): Unmarked Grave for shelter during the days in the wilderness. During this time I feed on animals and anyone in secluded mountain houses
responses.project_3_outcome: Increase the Ambience score of the Port
responses.project_3_description:
Project Name: Port Promo
Characters Involved: Me
Merits & Bonuses: Staff (Larceny)
My staff and I run underground promo for illegal warehouse raves in the Dock, enticing a glut of people to come
responses.project_4_outcome: Have a squizz at the Supernatural Exclusion Zone and see whats its about
responses.project_4_description:
Project Name: Other Side of the Tracks
Characters Involved: Me
Merits & Bonuses: n/a
XP Spend: n/a
Project Description: Lord Alexander said this world is full of all sorts of creatures (and even some humans) that I should watch out for, I can't imagine anything rougher than us though. Nonetheless, probably best to size up the competition. I use Protean (2): Predatory Aspect's Feral Senses and Extra Sense alongside my investigatory skills to locate weird happenings within the Supernatural Exclusion Zone that I'm confident aren't the work of Kindred. I don't expect to necessarily be able to tell who or what caused it, I'm mainly looking for observations that I can bring to someone who knows more about this stuff than I do
responses.xp_spend:
XP Claimed: Attendance: 1, Costuming/Immersion 1, Downtime 1
Total XP Spent: 2
Project 2: Merit - Ride the Wave (4/5), 2xp
responses.form_feedback: These Downtimes are quiet robust and provide a lot of space for players to approach things in their way; I do not envy the amount of work managing this must take, but I do appreciate you for it
